examples: Cases of human death have been due to anaphylactic shock.
Anaphylactic reaction or shock is the primary cause of cardiac arrest from a wasp sting.
There have been reports of people hospitalised in France after suffering anaphylactic shock as a result of multiple stings.
Peanuts are the most common food trigger of life-threatening anaphylactic shock, accounting for more than half of all fatal food-induced allergic reactions.
Yet be warned, additional bites could once again lead to anaphylactic shock.
